title: Swift Shafts
description: A very useful "elevator" mod that removes the need for boring stairs and ladders.
body:
# Aren't stairs and ladders just so boring? Say hello to **_Swift Shafts!_**

## What does this mod add?
This mod adds one extremely useful block - the _Transporter Shaft!_ **With this block, you can create elevator shafts in your builds that allow you to teleport from floor to floor without the use of ladders or stairs!**

## How do I make a Transporter Shaft?
**Here is the recipe - easy and great for pregame and endgame bases!**
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4efd29c823bee0bb29791a577e9d43f238ae92fa.png)

## How do I use the Transporter Shafts?
To use the transporter shafts, just put one above the other (at least 3 blocks away on the Y-axis)
![Recommended layout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/800dcae1ea4474c29ef018e52c1cffa2fd44ca35.png)
Once they are in place, stand on one of the Transporter Shafts, and you should see particles emit from it!

### **Light blue up arrow particles mean that you can travel up, and dark blue down arrow particles mean that you can travel down**
### 
### Then just look up and crouch to go up, or look down and crouch to go down!
###
###
### _If there is a block covering one of the Transporter Shafts, it will be skipped in the column!_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MaOp5uw8kV8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Commands
The default range for the Transporter Shaft is 20 blocks up and down, but you can change that with this command:
```
/ss shaftDetectionRange set [number]
```
You can also see the current setting by using:
```
/ss shaftDetectionRange get
```

# _Goodbye forever, stairs and ladders!_
